questionHtml: Suggest, with a reason, if fat-soluble or water-soluble xenobiotics would have a larger BMF.
markschemeHtml:
fat-soluble AND pass through lipid membranes/accumulate in cells/fatty tissues
OR
fat-soluble AND less easily excreted/metabolized ✔

Accept “water-soluble” only if an organometallic–protein interaction is mentioned.

meta.title: Suggest, with a reason, if fat-soluble or water-soluble xenobiotics would have a larger BMF.
